nasb.text: ‘Then on the seventh day: seven bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: “On the seventh day seven bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without blemish,

cnv.text: “‘第七日，要獻公牛七頭、公綿羊兩隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔十四隻；

ccb.text: “节期的第七天，你们要献上毫无残疾的公牛七头、公绵羊两只和一岁的公羊羔十四只；
